vivid/color/border.$description: A default border color used for standard borders, dividers, and strokes.

vivid/color/border/strong.$description: A strong border color used for high-emphasis borders, dividers, and strokes.

vivid/color/border/muted.$description: A muted border color used for low-emphasis borders, dividers, and strokes.

vivid/color/border/primary.$description: A primary border color used to communicate brand presence and highlight key elements.

vivid/color/border/announcement.$description: An accent border color used for subtle emphasis, decoration, or supporting accent elements.

vivid/color/border/info.$description: A informational border color used for subtle emphasis, decoration, or supporting info elements.

vivid/color/border/danger.$description: A danger border color used for subtle emphasis, decoration, or supporting danger elements.

vivid/color/border/warning.$description: A warning border color used for subtle emphasis, decoration, or supporting warning elements.

vivid/color/border/success.$description: A success border color used for subtle emphasis, decoration, or supporting success elements.

vivid/color/border/neutral.$description: A neutral border color used for low-emphasis borders, dividers

vivid/color/border/disabled.$description: A border color used to indicate disabled states or non-interactive surfaces.
